---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a problem to help us improve / 报告 bug
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Describe the bug / 问题描述

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
清晰地描述你遇到的问题。

## 🔁 Steps to reproduce / 复现步骤

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## 💡 Expected behavior / 期望行为

What you expected to happen.
你期望发生的行为。

## 📋 Actual behavior / 实际行为

What actually happened (include the full error traceback).
实际发生的情况（请贴出完整的错误堆栈）。

```
<paste traceback here>
```

## 🧪 Test suite output / 测试套件输出

Please run `python tests/test_integration.py` and paste the result:
请执行 `python tests/test_integration.py` 并贴出结果：

```
<paste test output here>
```

## 🖥️ Environment / 运行环境

- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- Python version: <!-- e.g. 3.11.5 -->
- PyHikvisionSdk commit/version: <!-- e.g. v1.0.0 or commit hash -->
- Hikvision device model & firmware: <!-- if applicable -->

## 📎 Additional context / 补充信息

Add any other context, screenshots, or sample files about the problem here.
其他相关信息、截图或样例文件。
